title: Brick Variety
description: Adds hundreds of new bricks to the game, like sandstone, basalt, granite, diorite, andesite, terracotta, and concrete bricks, and their variants.
body:
Brick Variety: Enhance your Building Experience

Brick Variety is an immersive Minecraft mod that introduces a multitude of new bricks. Survive and thrive as you gather resources to craft sandstone, basalt, granite, diorite, andesite terracotta, and concrete bricks. (You're welcome, builders!) Unlock a world of creativity using their variants like stairs, slabs, walls, and more, allowing you to build diverse and textured structures. Expand your building possibilities and create stunning architectural designs with the Brick Variety mod.

Mod content

Currently, the mod adds:

  • Andesite Bricks and their variants
  • Mossy & Cracked Andesite Bricks and their variants
  • Granite Bricks and their variants
  • Mossy & Cracked Granite Bricks and their variants
  • Diorite Bricks and their variants
  • Mossy & Cracked Diorite Bricks and their variants
  • Basalt Bricks and their variants
  • Mossy & Cracked Basalt Bricks and their variants
  • Sandstone Bricks and their variants
  • Mossy & Cracked Sandstone Bricks and their variants
  • All colors of Concrete Bricks and their variants
  • All colors of Terracotta Bricks and their variants
  • GravelStone blocks and their variants
  • Mossy & Cracked Normal Bricks
  • The recipes for all the above content.

What's next?

We plan on adding new features (and bricks) to the mod, so stay tuned and follow the project for updates! Until then, happy building, I mean, brick-ing! Created using Mod Maker MCreator: https://mcreator.net/

Note: Only the 1.19.4 version is supported and will receive updates!

The fabric version requires the Fabric Api!
